name: 22"x30" Ribbed Wood Wall Mirror - Threshold™
description:
Elevate your home aesthetics with this Ribbed Wood Wall Mirror from Threshold™. This wall mirror features a wooden frame with a wavy design, accentuated by a ribbed texture along the border that adds a flowy, elegant touch to your space. Best of all, it's easy to mount on the wall using pegs or screws.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
